title: Sunshine Kitty
notes:
"Sunshine Kitty" on white, double sided graphic picture disc.

- Limited edition
- Deluxe edition
- Alternate cover art
- Two sided graphic picture disc vinyl
- Exclusive gatefold artwork
- 12 x 24" folded poster
- additional hand signed poster
- Sunshine Kitty sticker set
- First 100 preorders get an original signed polaroid photo
